name: dungeon
hints: There is a shovel and a jail cell here. Take the shovel - it may be useful for digging.
GET SHOVEL. LOOK CELL to check the jail cell. The cell may have a way to trap something.
GET SHOVEL for digging. The cell can be used to imprison dangerous creatures. SOUTH to torture chamber, EAST to stairwell.

effects: Message: I see nothing very special.

notes: Dungeon with a pocket shovel and open jail cell. The shovel is useful for digging. SOUTH leads to the torture chamber (room 13). EAST to the stairwell (room 2).
